# Transcrição: 01.9 VIDEOS TO PREVIOUS PITCHES

- **Fonte:** 01.9 VIDEOS TO PREVIOUS PITCHES
- **Duração:** 02:59

## [00:00 - 02:59]

Hey guys, what's going on? This is going to be the third and final method of video prospecting that we're going to review in this course. So really what this one comes down to is reaching out to people who you've already pitched before. So it might have been someone you've pitched on a sales call, it might have been a video call, it might have been in person meeting, it could have been multiple meetings, but generally what these people are is they're hot audiences. So they know your service, they know what you provide, they know that they can benefit from it, and they know the pricing. So really all it comes down to here is getting them to the yes. And this can actually work even if people have said no to you previously. So this is just adding another touch point in, adding another really another place where you can build trust, build rapport, and build authority as well. So what you want to do here is really just send a 15 second to two minute video, it can be literally as short as 15 seconds, just saying, you know, hey I just wanted to reach out, was thinking about you, I just saw this article, or I just saw, you know, this video, or whatever it might be, or I noticed that you were doing this with your product, or you just had this special, whatever it might be, you're able to reach out to these people and just show that you're still, they're still top of mind for you, that you're still thinking about them, and that you know there's still an opportunity for you guys to work together. So even if they've said no, sending them a video and saying, hey I just realized you guys were doing this promotion, that's awesome, really exciting stuff, I just wanted to let you know, you know, whatever, whatever you want to reach out and say, it has to be something applicable and it can't be forced either. So you can't just necessarily force it, force a video out there, but if you can find articles that are actually relatable to them, actually relatable to their business, and you, you know, maybe send them that article and send them a quick summary and say, hey I just saw this article, I just thought it would be really, really applicable to you guys since you're doing XYZ, or since you're selling this product, this is something that's very, very similar and this is what these guys have had a ton of success with. You might be able to do that, alternatively you can also send some things that your other clients are doing as well. So if you don't have those NDAs in, if you don't have NDAs in, can't think of the word, in your, if you don't have your NDAs in your contract, then what you're able to do is essentially, you know, use some of those case studies, use some of the things that you've been doing for previous clients and say, hey, these guys are in a very similar space to you, this is what they've been doing and this is what, how they're kind of prepping up for Q4, or this is how they're, you know, they did really, really well on Black Friday last year. Whatever it might be, you're able to build up that rapport, build up another touch point and ultimately get some more trust and then build the relationship a little bit more. So this is the third and final method of video prospecting.
